{"step_by_step_thinking": "Salt and pepper retinopathy, also known as resolving retinal detachment, can be associated with resolving retinal detachment. Phenothiazine toxicity can cause salt and pepper retinopathy due to its effect on the retinal pigment epithelium. Congenital rubella syndrome can lead to salt and pepper retinopathy as a result of intrauterine infection. Fundus flavimaculatus, also known as Best disease, is characterized by yellowish flecks in the retina and does not typically present with salt and pepper retinopathy.", "answer_choice": "D"}
